positive: A highly detailed, ornate celestial botanical pattern resembling a cosmic mandala. The design features stylized lunar phases integrated with exotic flowers and intertwining vines, surrounded by geometric constellations and ethereal star dust. Style is neo-art deco etching combined with Japanese ukiyo-e linework. The palette uses deep midnight navy, shimmering antique gold, and luminous cream accents. Composition is centered, circular, and highly symmetrical, creating a rich, detailed silhouette perfect for apparel printing. Lighting is subtle, emphasizing the metallic sheen and intricate linework. Highly decorative, symmetrical, illustrative, perfect symmetry, high contrast, elegant, tattoo flash style, graphic novel art, engraving.
